description: Authoritative schema for the E# BoundTree node set. The generator (bound-nodes-gen.py) consumes this to regenerate BoundTreeVisitor.cs, BoundTreeRewriter.cs, and BoundNodes.Update.cs. Every change to the node set happens HERE first, then the generator is re-run. See contract-spine.md §1 for the CORE/FEATURE split rationale.

conventions.tier: CORE = survives lowering, reaches CodeGen. FEATURE = must be eliminated before CodeGen.

fields.name: <C# property name matching the record parameter>
fields.type: <C# type string, e.g. BoundExpression, IReadOnlyList<BoundStatement>, BoundType, string, bool, int, ...>
fields.nullable: <true if the field is T? — i.e. optional child>
fields.child_kind: expr | stmt | block | field_init_list | expr_list | stmt_list | member | null
fields.update: <true if this field appears in the Update() method (the rewriter-visible mutable subset)>

conventions.visit_children: The visitor walks every child whose child_kind is not null.
conventions.rewrite_children: The rewriter rewrites every child whose child_kind is not null AND update=true.
conventions.update_fields: Only fields with update=true appear in the Update() signature.
conventions.note: Scalar fields (string, bool, int, enum) are never child_kind — they do not recurse. BoundType fields in Update signatures are compared with ReferenceEquals per the cycle-prevention convention.

nodes.name: BoundUsing
nodes.note: Not a BoundNode subtype — a plain record used inside BoundCompilationUnit. No Visit/Rewrite entry needed.

nodes.name: BoundTryStatement
nodes.note: Catches is IReadOnlyList<BoundCatchClause>; the rewriter recurses into clause Body+Guard specially.

nodes.name: BoundMatchStatement
nodes.note: Arms is IReadOnlyList<BoundMatchArm>; each arm has a Pattern + Guard? + Body (block). Rewriter recurses into Guard + Body per arm.

nodes.name: BoundYieldStatement
nodes.note: A value yielded by an IAsyncEnumerable<T> producer. It becomes await AsyncStream.Write(channel, value, cancellationToken).

nodes.name: BoundSelectStatement
nodes.note: Arms is IReadOnlyList<BoundSelectArm>; each arm has Channel?, Value?, Body (block). Rewriter recurses per arm.

nodes.name: BoundErrorExpression
nodes.note: Type is always InferredType.Instance. No fields. Leaf.

nodes.name: BoundConversion
nodes.note: [Δ new] Unified cast/box/narrow node. Collapses BoundSafeCastExpression, BoundAssertCastExpression, BoundNarrowedExpression.

nodes.name: BoundTypeTestExpression
nodes.note: Boolean `is` / `is not` test. Produces bool, never a cast value. Kept as CORE primitive.

nodes.name: BoundOutArgumentExpression
nodes.note: Leaf — no child expressions to recurse into.

nodes.name: BoundAddressOfExpression
nodes.note: Leaf — takes a function name string + type info, emits ldftn.

nodes.name: BoundMethodGroupConversion
nodes.note: Names a method for delegate conversion. Receiver is the bound instance (null = static target / ldnull; a closure trampoline binds the display instance). <receiver>/ldftn/newobj.

nodes.name: BoundAddressOfVariableExpression
nodes.note: result type = ByRefBoundType(PointeeType)

nodes.name: BoundHeapAllocExpression
nodes.note: result type = HeapPointerBoundType(PointeeType)

nodes.name: BoundInterpolatedStringExpression
nodes.note: CORE leaf — CodeGen emits string.Concat(object[]) directly (EmitInterpolatedExpression), boxing value-type holes, exactly as ESC does. No lowering: a hole's own FEATURE nodes are lowered by the rewriter descending into each part's Expr. Parts is IReadOnlyList<BoundInterpolationPart>.

nodes.name: BoundMatchExpression
nodes.note: Arms is IReadOnlyList<BoundMatchExpressionArm>; each arm has Pattern + Guard? + Value. Rewriter handles per-arm.

nodes.name: BoundIfExpression
nodes.note: Branches is IReadOnlyList<BoundIfExpressionBranch>; each has Condition + Body (stmts) + Value?.

nodes.comment: === SUPPORTING (plain records, not BoundNode; used within node fields) ===
nodes.name: BoundField
nodes.note: Plain record, not a BoundNode. Fields carry optional DefaultValue expressions walked by the visitor.

nodes.name: BoundParameter
nodes.note: Plain record. DefaultValue? is a BoundExpression; walked at function/init declaration boundaries.

nodes.name: BoundFieldInit
nodes.note: Value is a BoundExpression — walked via RewriteFieldInits / VisitExpression(f.Value).

nodes.name: BoundMatchArm
nodes.note: Guard? + Body (block) are walked by the rewriter inside BoundMatchStatement's special child_kind.

nodes.name: BoundMatchExpressionArm
nodes.note: Guard? + Value (expr) walked inside BoundMatchExpression.

nodes.name: BoundMatchPattern
nodes.note: LiteralValue? is a BoundExpression but is not currently walked by the rewriter (binder proves it constant).

nodes.name: BoundInterpolationPart
nodes.note: Expr? is walked inside BoundInterpolatedStringExpression via the interp_part_list child_kind.

nodes.name: BoundSelectArm
nodes.note: Channel? + Value? + Body walked inside BoundSelectStatement via select_arm_list.

nodes.name: BoundIfExpressionBranch
nodes.note: Condition + Body (stmts) + Value? walked inside BoundIfExpression via if_expr_branch_list.

nodes.name: BoundCatchClause
nodes.note: Body (block) + Guard? walked inside BoundTryStatement via catch_list.

child_kind_registry.description: How each child_kind is handled during code generation of Visit / Rewrite methods.
child_kind_registry.member: BoundMember or IReadOnlyList<BoundFunctionDeclaration> — VisitMember / VisitFunctionDeclaration loop.
child_kind_registry.catch_list: IReadOnlyList<BoundCatchClause> — per-clause Body+Guard walk; special inline logic in rewriter.
child_kind_registry.match_arm_list: IReadOnlyList<BoundMatchArm> — per-arm Guard?+Body walk; special inline logic.

outputs: BoundTreeRewriter.cs — BoundTreeRewriter (identity rewriter; derive + override to transform)
BoundNodes.Update.cs — partial record extensions, one Update() per node with update fields
generator_contract.update_identity_rule: If all arguments are ReferenceEquals to their originals (and value-equal for bool/int/enum), return this; else return this with { ... }.
generator_contract.span_not_in_update: Span is never an Update parameter — it propagates unchanged from the original node.
generator_contract.boundtype_ref_equals: BoundType fields in Update are compared with ReferenceEquals, not structural equality, to avoid graph cycles via TypeSymbol.BoundView.
generator_contract.rewriter_no_alloc_on_identity: Rewrite methods check ReferenceEquals on every rewritten child before constructing a new node. If nothing changed, return the original reference.
generator_contract.feature_assert_subclass: A post-lowering BoundFeatureAssert rewriter (in Esharp.Lowering) overrides every FEATURE Visit to throw InvalidOperationException("FEATURE node <T> reached CodeGen").
